attack_surface.data_description: Process of directing BGT Variable Emissions

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of irrefutable proof linking a validator operator to specific BGT emission direction choices.

actor_risk.description: Entity running a validator node to secure the network.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Validator operator runs the validator software

assumptions: Validator emission direction choices are not cryptographically signed.
On-chain records of validator allocation choices are not definitive or auditable.

mitigation.strategy: Require validator signature for emission direction choices and ensure transparent on-chain records.

description: A validator operator may deny having directed BGT emissions to specific Reward Vaults.
